mapper.sql: storeAddrId, storeId, storeName, phone, province, city, zone, storeAddrDetail, longitude, latitude, status, createdDate
mapper.insert:
insert into store_address
storeAddrId,
storeId,
storeName,
phone,
province,
city,
zone,
storeAddrDetail,
longitude,
latitude,
status,
createdDate,
#{storeAddrId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{storeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{province,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{city,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{zone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{storeAddrDetail,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{longitude,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{latitude,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update store_address
storeId = #{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
storeName = #{storeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
province = #{province,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
city = #{city,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
zone = #{zone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
storeAddrDetail = #{storeAddrDetail,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
longitude = #{longitude,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
latitude = #{latitude,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where storeAddrId = #{storeAddrId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update store_address set storeId = #{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, storeName = #{storeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, province = #{province,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, city = #{city,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, zone = #{zone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, storeAddrDetail = #{storeAddrDetail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, longitude = #{longitude,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, latitude = #{latitude,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where storeAddrId = #{storeAddrId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select:
SELECT sa.*, s.status as storeStatus, s.storeImgUrl, s.hours, round( 6378.138 * 2 * asin( sqrt(pow(sin((#{userLat} * pi() / 180 - latitude * pi() / 180 ) / 2),2) + cos(#{userLat} * pi() / 180) * cos(latitude * pi() / 180) * pow( sin((#{userLng} * pi() / 180 - longitude * pi() / 180) / 2),2))) *1000) AS distance FROM store_address sa INNER JOIN store s ON sa.storeId = s.storeId
AND sa.province LIKE concat('%',#{province},'%')
AND sa.city LIKE concat('%',#{city},'%')
AND sa.zone LIKE concat('%',#{zone},'%')
AND sa.storeName LIKE concat('%',#{keywords},'%')
AND sa.storeId in (${storeIds})
AND sa.goodsIdStoreId = #{goodsIdStoreId}
AND sa.status=1
ORDER BY distance ASC
limit #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM store_address
AND province LIKE concat('%',#{province},'%')
AND city LIKE concat('%',#{city},'%')
AND zone LIKE concat('%',#{zone},'%')
AND storeName LIKE concat('%',#{keywords},'%')
AND sa.storeId in (${storeIds})
AND sa.goodsIdStoreId = #{goodsIdStoreId}
AND status=1

SELECT sa.*, s.status as storeStatus, s.storeImgUrl, s.hours, round( 6378.138 * 2 * asin( sqrt(pow(sin((#{userLat} * pi() / 180 - latitude * pi() / 180 ) / 2),2) + cos(#{userLat} * pi() / 180) * cos(latitude * pi() / 180) * pow( sin((#{userLng} * pi() / 180 - longitude * pi() / 180) / 2),2))) *1000) AS distance FROM store_address sa INNER JOIN store s ON sa.storeId = s.storeId
AND sa.province LIKE concat('%',#{province},'%')
AND sa.city LIKE concat('%',#{city},'%')
AND sa.zone LIKE concat('%',#{zone},'%')
AND sa.storeId = #{storeId}

SELECT storeId,province, city, zone, storeAddrDetail, round( 6378.138 * 2 * asin( sqrt(pow(sin((#{userLat} * pi() / 180 - latitude * pi() / 180 ) / 2),2) + cos(#{userLat} * pi() / 180) * cos(latitude * pi() / 180) * pow( sin((#{userLng} * pi() / 180 - longitude * pi() / 180) / 2),2))) *1000) AS distance FROM store_address where status=1 ORDER BY distance ASC limit 1

SELECT s.*, r.status as storeStatus, r.storeImgUrl, round( 6378.138 * 2 * asin( sqrt(pow(sin((#{userLat} * pi() / 180 - s.latitude * pi() / 180 ) / 2),2) + cos(#{userLat} * pi() / 180) * cos(s.latitude * pi() / 180) * pow( sin((#{userLng} * pi() / 180 - s.longitude * pi() / 180) / 2),2))) *1000) AS distance FROM store_address s inner join store r on r.storeId=s.storeId where s.status=1 ORDER BY distance ASC, r.storeId ASC
limit ${offset}, ${limit}
SELECT sa.*,s.agent5Ids,s.agent6Ids FROM store_address sa left join store s on s.storeAddrId = sa.storeAddrId WHERE s.storeAddrId = #{storeAddrId}

SELECT round( ACOS( SIN((PI() / 180) * latitude) * SIN((PI() / 180) * #{userLat}) + COS((PI() / 180) * latitude) * COS((PI() / 180) * #{userLat}) * COS((PI() / 180) * #{userLng} - (PI() / 180) * longitude) ) * 6371 * 1000 , 0) as distance FROM store_address WHERE storeId = #{storeId}
